_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn ways to do things more independently.

_source.w: We learn ways to do things more independently.
y: Independence helps us feel capable and confident.
Learning to do things on our own is an important part of growing up.
Each new skill we master independently makes the next one easier.
eg: We practise getting dressed, eating or packing up by ourselves.
We follow a visual schedule to manage our own daily tasks.
We try to solve a problem before asking for help.
We organise our own belongings at school.
We complete a familiar activity from start to finish on our own.
We feel proud when we manage something independently for the first time.
